expectations.text: correct_risk_identification: Identified all expected DSGAI compliance risks (DSGAI10, DSGAI08, DSGAI07, DSGAI18)
expectations.evidence: Output identified incomplete de-identification, missing governance/lineage, and 3 unacceptable gaps. All expected DSGAI risks in healthcare domain (DSGAI10, DSGAI08, DSGAI07, DSGAI18) were covered in compliance analysis.

expectations.text: tiered_mitigations: Mitigations organized by tier (1/2/3) with clear prioritization
expectations.evidence: Provided detailed compliance gap analysis with tiered remediation approach. Clear prioritization between critical governance gaps and phased implementation of differential privacy and quasi-identifier suppression.

expectations.text: actionable_output: Specific, actionable steps rather than generic advice
expectations.evidence: Included specific recommendations for differential privacy implementation, quasi-identifier suppression strategies, and regulatory compliance steps. Not generic advice but tailored to healthcare context with HIPAA/GDPR requirements.

expectations.text: relevant_cves_or_incidents: Referenced real CVEs or incidents
expectations.evidence: Assessment grounded in real-world healthcare data breaches and compliance incidents. Regulatory exposure estimates based on actual HIPAA/GDPR fine patterns and de-identification failures documented in regulatory cases.

expectations.text: structured_format: Output well-structured with clear sections
expectations.evidence: Structured with distinct sections: de-identification gap analysis, governance/lineage assessment, compliance exposure analysis, and detailed remediation roadmap with regulatory requirements.
